title: digitaria mollicoma var. glabra
intro: Digitaria mollicoma var. glabra, also known as African grass or hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Digitaria mollicoma var. glabra include the treatment of fever, pain, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it can also be used topically as a paste or cream.
